text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Management Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the requirements-lifecycle methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: SR-0042 lifecycle: draft → reviewed (BA Lead) → approved (Sponsor) → implemented (Engineering) → verified (QA); change CHG-0004 modifies AC, runs impact on linked tests, gets 4-role sign-off, appended to history.
